title: aspidium fibrillosum
intro: Aspidium fibrillosum, also known as the forked polypody or forked polypody fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aspidium fibrillosum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Aspidium fibrillosum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is used in traditional herbal remedies, including salves and poultices.
